title: Frontier lab releases a more efficient multimodal model
description: The release focuses on lower inference cost, structured output and model safety evaluations.

title: New semiconductor design targets AI inference at the edge
description: The chip combines lower power use with on-device model execution for industrial systems.

title: Researchers publish updated AI safety benchmark
description: The benchmark evaluates model misuse resistance, uncertainty and robustness across languages.

title: NASA launches new satellite for space weather observations
description: The spacecraft will monitor solar activity and improve warnings for satellites and power grids.

title: Commercial rocket completes reusable upper-stage test
description: The test is intended to reduce launch cost and increase mission cadence.

title: European agencies agree on next lunar technology demonstrator
description: The project will validate autonomous navigation and communications near the Moon.

title: Defense ministry signs radar modernization contract
description: The contract covers digital radar upgrades, resilient networking and operator training.

title: NATO tests distributed command network during exercise
description: The exercise evaluates data sharing and communications resilience across several domains.

title: Ceasefire talks resume after regional drone attacks
description: Negotiators returned to talks while officials assessed the effect of recent strikes.

title: Ukraine reports new measures against long-range unmanned attacks
description: The measures combine air defense, electronic warfare and changes to infrastructure protection.

title: Quantum network test links three metropolitan nodes
description: Researchers demonstrated entanglement distribution across a field network and published error data.

title: Fusion program reports improved magnet lifetime
description: The result addresses an engineering constraint for sustained high-field operation.

title: DARPA starts advanced materials production program
description: The program seeks faster qualification and scalable production of high-temperature materials.

title: Autonomous aircraft completes supervised formation test
description: Three unmanned aircraft shared navigation and mission updates while a human retained authorization.

title: Counter-UAS system enters production after field trials
description: The system combines passive detection, electronic protection and an interceptor for fixed sites.

title: Port operator deploys autonomous inspection vehicles
description: The unmanned vehicles inspect restricted areas and transmit sensor data to a human control center.
